content: <paragraph>The "<pink>Spring</pink> Snow" Event Wish is now available. During the event, the wish drop rate for the <red>limited</red> 5-star character <cyan>"The Super Super Super Awesome Me☆ · March 7th (Ice)"</cyan> and 4-star characters <cyan>"Virtual Singer · Hatsune Miku (Ice)"</cyan>, <blue>"Otaku Angel · Misaki Nakahara (Water)"</blue>, and <green>"Free Common Model · Hiyori Momose (Grass)"</green> will be <red>greatly increased</red>!</paragraph><paragraph><red>*This event wish is available for a limited time. All items in the event may be available again in the future. Among the above characters, limited characters will not be added to the "Wanderlust Invocation" Standard Wish.</red></paragraph><paragraph>*In general, the base probability applies to all characters. Rules such as boosted rates or guarantees are subject to specific details.</paragraph><heading>〓Wish Rules〓</heading><paragraph>[5-Star Items]</paragraph><paragraph>In this "<pink>Spring</pink> Snow" Event Wish, the base probability for a 5-star character wish is <red>0.600%</red>, and the consolidated probability (including guarantees) is <red>1.600%</red>. A 5-star character is <red>guaranteed</red> within <red>90</red> wishes through the guarantee system.</paragraph><paragraph>When obtaining a 5-star character, there is a <red>50.000%</red> base probability that it will be the current 5-star featured character <cyan>"The Super Super Super Awesome Me☆ · March 7th (Ice)"</cyan>.</paragraph><paragraph>If the 5-star character obtained is not the current featured character, the next 5-star character obtained is <red>guaranteed</red> to be the featured character.</paragraph><paragraph>[4-Star Items]</paragraph><paragraph>In this "<pink>Spring</pink> Snow" Event Wish, the base probability for a 4-star character wish is <red>5.100%</red>, and the consolidated probability (including guarantees) is <red>13.000%</red>. A 4-star or higher item is <red>guaranteed</red> within 10 wishes. The probability of obtaining a 4-star item through the guarantee is <red>99.400%</red>, and the probability for a 5-star item is <red>0.600%</red>.</paragraph><paragraph>When obtaining a 4-star item, there is a <red>50.000%</red> probability it will be one of the featured 4-star characters: <cyan>"Virtual Singer · Hatsune Miku (Ice)"</cyan>, <blue>"Otaku Angel · Misaki Nakahara (Water)"</blue>, or <green>"Free Common Model · Hiyori Momose (Grass)"</green>. If the 4-star item obtained is not one of the featured characters, the next 4-star item obtained is <red>guaranteed</red> to be a featured character. When a featured 4-star item is obtained, the probability of getting each featured character is equal.</paragraph><heading>〓Regarding Duplicate Characters〓</heading><paragraph>Regardless of the method of acquisition (including but not limited to wishes, shop exchange, system rewards, etc.), each duplicate 5-star character will be converted into 100 Stardust.</paragraph><paragraph>Regardless of the method of acquisition (including but not limited to wishes, shop exchange, system rewards, etc.), each duplicate 4-star character will be converted into 50 Stardust.</paragraph>
